pages.text: 今天天气特别好，咘咘和小乌龟慢慢在河边玩沙子。慢慢动作很慢，但是堆的沙堡特别漂亮。
pages.text_en: Today the weather was perfect. Bubu and the little turtle, Manman, were playing by the river. Manman was slow, but his sandcastle was very beautiful.

pages.text: 慢慢你堆得好漂亮！咘咘看着慢慢堆的城堡，也想自己堆一个更大的。咘咘堆啊堆，可是总是塌。
pages.text_en: Manman, your castle is so beautiful! Bubu was inspired to make her own, but bigger. She tried and tried, but it kept falling down.

pages.text: 咘咘有点着急，一不小心碰到了慢慢的沙堡——哗啦！慢慢辛苦堆的城堡倒了！
pages.text_en: Bubu got a little anxious and accidentally knocked over Manman’s castle—crash! All of Manman’s hard work was ruined!

pages.text: 慢慢看着自己的城堡变成一堆沙子，眼泪一下子就流出来了。"我堆了好久好久……"
pages.text_en: Manman looked at his castle, now a pile of sand, and tears started streaming down. "I worked so hard on that..."

pages.text: 咘咘心里也很难过，但是不知道该说什么。她跑回家，躲在房间里不出来。
pages.text_en: Bubu felt awful but didn’t know what to say. She ran home and hid in her room.

pages.text: Sam 爸爸发现咘咘不开心，走进来坐在她身边。"发生什么事了呀？"咘咘把事情告诉了 Sam 爸爸。
pages.text_en: Daddy Sam saw that Bubu wasn’t happy. He walked in and sat beside her. "What happened?" Bubu explained the whole story to him.

pages.text: Sam 爸爸说："做错了事情不可怕，可怕的是不愿意说对不起。你觉得慢慢现在心里是什么感受？"咘咘想了想："她一定很难过……"
pages.text_en: Daddy Sam said: "Making a mistake isn’t scary. What’s scary is not saying sorry. How do you think Manman feels now?" Bubu thought and said, "She must be really sad..."

pages.text: Tina 妈妈在厨房里烤了一盘小饼干。"咘咘，带上这些饼干去找慢慢吧。一起吃饼干，什么话都好说。"
pages.text_en: Mommy Tina baked a tray of cookies in the kitchen. "Bubu, take these cookies to Manman. Share them together, and you can talk about anything."

pages.text: 咘咘捧着饼干来到河边。慢慢还在那里，默默地重新堆沙堡。咘咘深呼吸，走过去说："慢慢，对不起。我不是故意弄倒你的城堡的。"
pages.text_en: Bubu carried the cookies to the riverbank. Manman was still there, quietly rebuilding her castle. Bubu took a deep breath and said, "Manman, I’m sorry. I didn’t mean to knock over your castle."

pages.text: 慢慢抬起头，没有说话。咘咘把饼干放在慢慢面前："这是 Tina 妈妈烤的，给你吃。我可以帮你一起重新堆吗？"
pages.text_en: Manman looked up but didn’t say anything. Bubu placed the cookies in front of her and said, "Mommy Tina baked these. Want to share? Can I help rebuild your castle?"

pages.text: 慢慢看了看饼干，又看了看咘咘，慢慢地笑了。"好吧……你帮我扶着这边，不要再碰倒了哦。"
pages.text_en: Manman looked at the cookies, then at Bubu, and finally smiled. "Okay... You hold this side, but don’t knock it over this time."

pages.text: 两个人一起堆了一座比之前更大更漂亮的城堡！NOMI 路过看到了："哇！这个城堡好厉害！是你们两个一起堆的吗？"
pages.text_en: Together, they built a castle even bigger and prettier than before! NOMI passed by and said, "Wow! What an amazing castle! Did you build it together?"

pages.text: 咘咘和慢慢一起笑着说："对呀！两个人一起比一个人好！"NONO 飞过来在城堡顶上插了一面小旗子。
pages.text_en: Bubu and Manman laughed together and said, "Yes! Two people are better than one!" NONO flew over and planted a little flag on top.

pages.text: 回家的路上，Sam 爸爸问："今天学到什么了？"咘咘说："说对不起虽然有点难，但说了以后，就会变得更好！而且两个人一起做事比一个人更开心！"Sam 爸爸摸了摸咘
pages.text_en: On the way home, Daddy Sam asked: "What did you learn today?" Bubu said: "Saying sorry is hard, but it makes things a lot better! And doing things together is more fun than doing them alone!" Daddy Sam patted Bubu.

pages.text: 💡 咘咘今天学到了：做错了事情不要害怕，勇敢地说"对不起"。真心道歉，朋友会原谅你的。而且两个人一起合作，可以做出比一个人更厉害的东西！
pages.text_en: 💡 Bubu learned today: Don’t be afraid to admit your mistakes. Be brave and say "sorry." If you truly mean it, friends will forgive you. And working together, you can achieve even more than doing it alone!
